data: Rhoades Institute of Technology terms of service, cookie policy, and legal disclosures.

Organizational Structure {#organization}

The Rhoades Institute of Technology (RIT) is a Wisconsin 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization focused on civic literacy, technology education, and community dialogue.

This structure is currently being formalized with legal counsel. Details on this page will be updated as the organizational framework is finalized.

Terms of Use {#terms}

Copyright © 2026 The Rhoades Institute of Technology. All rights reserved.

This website and its content are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, express or implied.

Cookie Policy {#cookies}

This site uses one essential cookie (rit_cookie_consent) to remember your consent choice. No analytics cookies are set. No personal data is collected through cookies.

DMCA {#dmca}

To report copyright infringement, contact rit.ptaa@gmail.com.

Project-Specific Legal {#project-legal}

Individual RIT projects may have additional legal terms, licensing models, or intellectual property disclosures:

  • TVN Bridge — Shared source licensing philosophy, IP ownership, software terms
